title: extract_fa -ha broken
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Extract [half_adder.zip](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/files/3488759/half_adder.zip) 

Using latest build gives error, before it was returning OKAY

```
yosys -p 'read_verilog top.v ; synth ; extract_fa -ha -v ; write_verilog synth.v'

iverilog testbench.v synth.v  /usr/local/share/yosys/simlib.v

./a.out  should give OKAY
```
code_blocks:
yosys -p 'read_verilog top.v ; synth ; extract_fa -ha -v ; write_verilog synth.v'

iverilog testbench.v synth.v  /usr/local/share/yosys/simlib.v

./a.out  should give OKAY
